columns.biomass_volume: adu.sum(0.0673 * (for_sp.dens * (meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10)^2 * hgt_perp)^0.976 if cond = 1) / (20^2 * pi() / 10000) / 1000
columns.bio_idx_deadWood: ((adu.sum(0.0673 * (for_dw.dens * (meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10)^2 * hgt_perp)^0.976 if cond = 2) + adu.sum(pi() / 3 * ((meas_b / 2)^2 + ((meas_e / 2)^2 + meas_b / 2 + meas_e / 2) * lght * for_dw.dens) if cond = 3)) / adu.sum(0.0673 * (for_sp.dens * (meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10)^2 * hgt_perp)^0.976 if cond = 1)) / 30 * 10
columns.bio_idx_spatial_distribution: gini_arr(list_concat(list(adu.count(1 if cond=1 and area=1)), list(adu.count(1 if cond=1 and area=2)), list(adu.count(1 if cond=1 and area=3)), list(adu.count(1 if cond=1 and area=4)))) * 10
columns.bio_idx_diametric_distribution: adu.gini(meas1 + meas2 + meas3 + meas4 + meas5 + meas6 + meas7 + meas8 + meas9 + meas10) * 10
columns.soil_structure_idx: (thk1*float(not1) + thk2*float(not2) + thk3*float(not3) + thk4*float(not4) + thk5*float(not5)) / (thk1 + thk2 + thk3 + thk4 + thk5)
columns.soil_eros_water_infiltration: 600 * 300 / ( (epoch(interval(beer1)) + ( epoch(interval(beer2)) if beer2!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer3)) if beer3!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer4)) if beer4!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer5)) if beer5!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer6)) if beer6!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer7)) if beer7!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer8)) if beer8!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer9)) if beer9!='' ) + ( epoch(interval(beer10)) if beer10!='' ) ) / non_null_count(beer1, beer2, beer3, beer4, beer5, beer6, beer7, beer8, beer9, beer10) * pi() * 9^2) if beer1 != ''
columns.soil_fauna_abundance_pop: list_concat(list(tsbf_001.concat_ws(':', concat_ws('-',tsbf_tax1, tsbf_tax2, tsbf_tax3), tsbf_no) if tsbf_001.tsbf_no > 0))
columns.soil_surface_fauna_abundance: list_aggregate(list_concat(list(nullif(barba_001.concat_ws('-', barbA_tax1, barbA_tax2, barbA_tax3), '')), list(nullif(barbb_001.concat_ws('-', barbB_tax1, barbB_tax2, barbB_tax3), '')), list(nullif(barbc_001.concat_ws('-', barbC_tax1, barbC_tax2, barbC_tax3), '')), list(nullif(barbd_001.concat_ws('-', barbD_tax1, barbD_tax2, barbD_tax3), ''))), 'histogram')
columns.soil_surface_fauna_abundance_pop: list_concat(list(barba_001.concat_ws(':', concat_ws('-',barbA_tax1, barbA_tax2, barbA_tax3), barbA_no) if barba_001.barbA_no > 0), list(barbb_001.concat_ws(':', concat_ws('-',barbB_tax1, barbB_tax2, barbB_tax3), barbB_no) if barbb_001.barbB_no > 0), list(barbc_001.concat_ws(':', concat_ws('-',barbC_tax1, barbC_tax2, barbC_tax3), barbC_no) if barbc_001.barbC_no > 0), list(barbd_001.concat_ws(':', concat_ws('-',barbD_tax1, barbD_tax2, barbD_tax3), barbD_no) if barbd_001.barbD_no > 0))

columns.taxons_abundance_pop: list_concat(list(inv_001.concat_ws(':', concat_ws('-',tax1, tax2, tax3), no) if inv_001.no > 0))

columns.wood_fuel_cons: sum( 12 * ( ifnull(fw_qty * enq_fw.fw_vol * fw_freq, 0) + ifnull(coal_qty * enq_coal.coal_kg * coal_freq * enq_coal.coal_fw, 0) / enq_coal.coal_dens )) / sum(res)
columns.firewood_satis1: count(1 if wf_satis = '1') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis2: count(1 if wf_satis = '2') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis3: count(1 if wf_satis = '3') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis98: count(1 if wf_satis = '98') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.firewood_satis99: count(1 if wf_satis = '99') / count(1 if int(wf_satis) > 0) * 100
columns.timber_satis1: count(1 if timb_satis = '1' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis2: count(1 if timb_satis = '2' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis3: count(1 if timb_satis = '3' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis98: count(1 if timb_satis = '98' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.timber_satis99: count(1 if timb_satis = '99' and timb_yn = '1') / count(1 if timb_yn = '1') * 100
columns.revenue_change: avg(0 - inc_dif if inc_evol = '2' else ifnull(inc_dif, 0))
columns.assets_idx_raw: avg( ( ( int(hous_typ) + int(hous_size)) * int(hous_own) + ifnull(list_unique(ass),0) + int(lvst_yn) * ( int(lvst_s) + int(lvst_l) ) + ( int( land_own ) + int( land_titl ) + int( land_size ) if int(land_own) > 0 else 0) ) if ( ( int(hous_typ) + int(hous_size)) * int(hous_own) + list_unique(ass) + int(lvst_yn) * ( int(lvst_s) + int(lvst_l) ) + int( land_own ) + int( land_titl ) + int( land_size ) ) <= int(ass_tot_max) )
columns.assets_idx: 10 / int(ass_tot_max) * avg( ( ( int(hous_typ) + int(hous_size)) * int(hous_own) + ifnull(list_unique(ass),0) + int(lvst_yn) * ( int(lvst_s) + int(lvst_l) ) + ( int( land_own ) + int( land_titl ) + int( land_size ) if int(land_own) > 0 else 0) ) if ( ( int(hous_typ) + int(hous_size)) * int(hous_own) + list_unique(ass) + int(lvst_yn) * ( int(lvst_s) + int(lvst_l) ) + int( land_own ) + int( land_titl ) + int( land_size ) ) <= int(ass_tot_max) )
